backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a crypto portfolio tracker with holdings management, transaction history, user profiles, and role-based access control using Internet Identity principals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the transaction history panel implementation with references to relevant frontend components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing components for authentication, portfolio management, holdings tracking, performance visualization, and transaction history.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables using a warm neutral palette without blue or purple tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tags and root div for mounting the Crypto Portfolio app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating authentication flow, user profile setup, and rendering the main portfolio dashboard with summary cards, holdings, performance panels, and transaction history.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Unauthenticated landing page component displaying app features and Internet Identity sign-in button with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/auth/UserProfile: Modal dialog forcing first-time users to enter their name after authentication before accessing the portfolio dashboard.
frontend/src/components/charts/Allocatio: Custom SVG donut chart component rendering portfolio allocation by asset value using theme-aware OKLCH colors without external chart libraries.
frontend/src/components/holdings/Archive: Displays a table of fully sold (archived) holdings with their original quantity, number of sales, and last sale date. Shows loading skeleton and empty state when no archived holdings exist.
frontend/src/components/holdings/Holding: Provides a dropdown menu with actions (Sell, Edit, Delete) for each holding row. Manages dialog states and handles the delete confirmation flow with AlertDialog.

Main holdings view with tabs for active and archived holdings, displaying a table with live prices, profit/loss calculations, and row actions. Integrates live price updates and provides add holding functionality.
Dialog form for adding new holdings or editing existing ones, capturing asset symbol, quantity, and optional cost basis. Handles both create and update mutations.
frontend/src/components/holdings/SellDia: Dialog form for recording the sale of a holding, capturing quantity sold and sale price. Displays current holding information and handles sale mutation with error feedback.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout wrapper providing header with logo, theme toggle, and logout button, plus footer with attribution. Includes a subtle background image overlay.
frontend/src/components/performance/Perf: Displays a table of per-asset performance metrics including cost basis, current value, gain/loss, and percentage change for active holdings with cost basis data.
Renders a sticky card containing a donut chart that visualizes portfolio allocation by current value across active holdings.
frontend/src/components/portfolio/Portfo: Displays three summary cards showing total portfolio value, total gain/loss, and return percentage with live price updates and loading states.
frontend/src/components/transactions/Tra: Shows a table of all buy and sell transactions with details including asset, type, shares, price per share, total value, and date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality with AuthClient management and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLivePrices.ts: Custom hook that fetches and caches live asset prices with 60-second refresh intervals, maintaining last successful prices on error for resilience.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, holdings, archived holdings, and transactions from the backend actor, with toast notifications for success/error states.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/services/prices/priceApi.ts: Service for fetching cryptocurrency prices from CoinGecko API with asset symbol mapping and normalization logic.
frontend/src/utils/performanceMath.ts: Utility functions for calculating holding and portfolio performance metrics including gain/loss, percentages, and profit/loss from sale history.
frontend/src/utils/portfolioMath.ts: Utility functions for calculating portfolio values and formatting numbers, currency, and percentages for display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and session storage, supporting both regular and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors, border radius, shadows, and animations using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document showing a crypto portfolio tracker with existing transaction history feature and pending feature requests for transaction list display and backend function.
